moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Preps Begin
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, The Championships, Wimbledon, begins its 2026 edition on Monday, June 29th.

angles.name: Anticipation Build-Up
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here, with the first serves flying on Monday June 29th. Who are you backing for glory this year?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: London is gearing up for tennis fever! Wimbledon kicks off June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class action to SW19. Are you heading to the courts or watching from Henman Hill?

moments.title: World Cup Buzz Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is currently generating significant buzz, with new content like 'The Rest is Football' podcast on Netflix covering all the action.

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: Is the World Cup taking over your life yet? Whether you're glued to every match or just soaking up the atmosphere, it's the talk of the nation!

angles.name: Podcast Tie-in
angles.copy: Need to catch up on all the World Cup action? 'The Rest is Football' podcast is diving deep into every game on Netflix. Perfect for your commute!

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open Begins
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne Open, a key grass court tennis tournament, kicks off tomorrow, June 20th, running until June 27th.

angles.name: Local Tennis Action
angles.copy: Eastbourne is serving up some top-tier tennis! The Lexus Eastbourne Open starts tomorrow, bringing international stars to the South Coast. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Wimbledon Warm-Up
angles.copy: The grass court season is in full swing! The Lexus Eastbourne Open starts tomorrow, a crucial warm-up for Wimbledon. Who's got the momentum?

moments.title: Golowan Festival in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's traditional Golowan Festival, celebrating midsummer with music and dance, begins today, June 19th, and runs until June 28th.

angles.name: Cornwall Celebration
angles.copy: Penzance is alive with colour and sound! The Golowan Festival kicks off today, bringing 10 days of midsummer magic to Cornwall. Get ready for parades, music and pure joy!

angles.name: Devon & Cornwall Buzz
angles.copy: Heading west this weekend? Penzance's fantastic Golowan Festival starts today! It's a vibrant celebration of midsummer just down the road in Cornwall.

moments.title: New Rom-Com on Netflix Today
moments.blurb: 'Voicemails for Isabelle', a romantic comedy starring Zoey Deutch, is new on Netflix UK today, June 19th.

angles.name: New Watch Tonight
angles.copy: Friday night plans? 'Voicemails for Isabelle' just landed on Netflix UK! Get ready for a new romantic comedy to kick off your weekend.

angles.name: Rom-Com Alert
angles.copy: Grab the popcorn! A brand new rom-com, 'Voicemails for Isabelle', is streaming on Netflix UK from today. Perfect for a cosy night in.

moments.title: John Cena Comedy on Netflix
moments.blurb: The new comedy film 'Little Brother', starring John Cena and Eric André, arrives on Netflix UK on Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Upcoming Comedy
angles.copy: Get ready to laugh! John Cena and Eric André team up in the new comedy 'Little Brother', hitting Netflix UK next Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Weekend Watchlist
angles.copy: Planning your watchlist for next week? John Cena's new comedy 'Little Brother' drops on Netflix UK on June 26th. Looks like a wild ride!

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender S2
moments.blurb: The second season of Netflix's live-action adaptation 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' is set to premiere on Wednesday, June 25th.

angles.name: Fantasy Series Return
angles.copy: The wait is almost over for Avatar fans! Season 2 of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' hits Netflix UK next Wednesday, June 25th. Who's excited?

angles.name: Mid-Week Binge
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The new season of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' arrives on Netflix UK on June 25th. Time for a mid-week binge!

moments.title: Lionel Richie Turns 77
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, June 20th.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday you're looking for? Tomorrow, the legend celebrates another year of 'Easy' listening hits!

angles.name: Love Songs Maestro
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the maestro of romance, Lionel Richie, as he turns 77! What's your favourite Lionel love song?

moments.title: Chris Pratt Turns 47
moments.blurb: Hollywood star Chris Pratt, known for 'Guardians of the Galaxy' and 'Jurassic World', celebrates his 47th birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Movie Star Birthday
angles.copy: From Star-Lord to Super Mario, Chris Pratt turns 47 this Sunday! What's your favourite role from the Guardians of the Galaxy star?

angles.name: Weekend Celeb
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to Chris Pratt! The action hero and comedy legend turns 47 on Sunday. Time to rewatch some Parks and Rec?

moments.title: Prince William Turns 44
moments.blurb: HRH The Prince of Wales, Prince William, heir to the British throne, celebrates his 44th birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Royal Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 44th Birthday to HRH The Prince of Wales, Prince William, this Sunday! Wishing him a fantastic day.

angles.name: Welsh Connection
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to our Prince of Wales! Prince William turns 44 on Sunday. How will you be celebrating the longest day of the year?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic style, celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Alt-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the enigmatic Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your ultimate Lana track?

angles.name: Weekend Music
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to Lana Del Rey on Sunday! Her beautiful, haunting songs are perfect for a reflective weekend.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: She's so unusual, and she's turning 73! Happy Birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper this Monday. What's your favourite hit from her?

angles.name: Pop Legend
angles.copy: Time after time, Cyndi Lauper has given us classics! She celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday. Let's send her some love!

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Solange Knowles, known for her distinctive R&B sound and visual artistry, celebrates her 40th birthday on Wednesday, June 24th.

angles.name: R&B Visionary
angles.copy: Celebrating a true artist! Solange Knowles turns 40 this Wednesday. What's your go-to track from her incredible discography?

angles.name: Mid-Week Groove
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! Solange Knowles celebrates her 40th birthday on Wednesday. Her unique sound always gets us moving.

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande this Thursday! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Another year, another reason to celebrate Ariana Grande! The pop icon turns 33 on Thursday. Her hits just keep coming!

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is this Sunday! Get ready for the longest day of the year and make the most of those extra hours of daylight. How will you spend it?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Sunday marks the official start of astronomical summer with the Solstice! Soak up those long, light evenings. What's your favourite summer sound?

moments.title: Stonehenge Solstice Gathering
moments.blurb: Thousands are expected to gather at Stonehenge to witness the sunrise on the Summer Solstice, with open access from Saturday evening, June 20th to Sunday morning, June 21st.

angles.name: Ancient Tradition
angles.copy: An ancient tradition continues! Thousands will gather at Stonehenge from tomorrow evening to greet the Summer Solstice sunrise. A truly magical moment.

angles.name: Unique Experience
angles.copy: Fancy an unforgettable experience? Stonehenge opens for free access from tomorrow evening for the Summer Solstice sunrise. It's one of the few times you can walk among the stones!
